table.documentation: Provides modelers with a regular reference time for modeling fixed time-based statistics. The ticks are evenly spaced with a configurable frequency specifying the number of events to generate per second, so a tick schema with a frequency of 10 will generate a row every 100ms.
Identifies where an application is in its lifecycle.

Provides modelers with a regular reference time for modeling fixed time-based statistics. The ticks are evenly spaced with a configurable frequency specifying the number of events to generate per second, so a tick schema with a frequency of 10 will generate a row every 100ms.
Denotes the current thermal state of the device.
Holds a message from the OS's Unified Logging and Tracing component.
Holds a signpost event from the OS's Unified Logging and Tracing component.
Holds a signpost event from the OS's Unified Logging and Tracing component.

table.category: "Hang Risk" "Severe Hang Risk" CFNetwork Contacts CoreML
table.documentation: Holds a message from the OS's Unified Logging and Tracing component.
A point of interest that can be laid out on a graph view.
Marks a point in time denoted by a special type of kdebug trace.
When combined with other time-profile samples, creates a statistical picture of where your application is spending its time.
Associates numeric arguments with strings in kdebug trace points.
Associates numeric arguments with strings in kdebug trace points.
Associates processes with their process names.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Determined by the modelers and represent a focus area that the developer is likely to be intereseted in.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Layout information for graphing regions of interest.
Holds a metadata argument from the OS's Unified Logging and Tracing component.
Find sub-optimal uses of Grand Central Dispatch.
Associates threads with their owning process.
Describes details about a given region of interest.
Holds a raw CPU profiling sample.
Holds a signpost metadata argument from the OS's Unified Logging and Tracing component.
